purpose: Desktop Systems Lab HD asset manifest

systems.title: PT6A Engine
systems.description: Engine architecture, airflow, fuel control, oil system, ignition, starting, and power section study.

systems.title: Fuel System
systems.description: Main tanks, wing tanks, boost pumps, crossfeed, transfer, fuel pressure, and failure logic.

systems.title: Hydraulic System
systems.description: Electric pump, accumulator, brakes, steering, flaps, hand pump, leakage scenarios, and pressure indications.

systems.title: Electrical System
systems.description: Generators, buses, inverters, bus tie, caution logic, and abnormal electrical configurations.

systems.title: Propeller System
systems.description: Constant speed unit, beta/reverse, overspeed governor, fuel topping governor, feathering, and reset logic.

systems.title: Autofeather
systems.description: Arming logic, torque switches, feather command, failure cases, and QRH bridge.
